ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rate_classes" (
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate class */,
  "rate_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate class (e.g., Residential, GS-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate class */,
  "peak_rate" REAL /* Peak rate for energy consumption */,
  "off_peak_rate" REAL /* Off-peak rate for energy consumption */,
  "time_of_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate class has time-of-use rates */,
  "renewable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy from renewable sources */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rate class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation credit entry */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated rate class */,
  "avg_generation_credit" REAL /* Average generation credit value */,
  "ctc" REAL /* Credit transfer calculation (CTC) */,
  "pcia" REAL /* Power Charge Indifference Adjustment (PCIA) */,
  "wregis" REAL /* WREGIS credit value */,
  "caiso" REAL /* CAISO value */,
  "ra" TEXT /* RA classification */,
  "peak_credit" REAL /* Average generation credit for peak hours */,
  "off_peak_credit" REAL /* Average generation credit for off-peak hours */,
  "renewable_credit" REAL /* Average generation credit from renewable sources */,
  "non_renewable_credit" REAL /* Average generation credit from non-renewable sources */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the generation credit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_credits_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., utility staff, regulator, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the consumption */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class for the consumption */,
  "consumption_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed (in kWh) */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Billing period for the consumption record */,
  "peak_consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed during off-peak hours */,
  "renewable_consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed from renewable sources */,
  "non_renewable_consumption" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed from non-renewable sources */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the consumption record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits_calculation" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credits calculation record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation credit entry */,
  "total_credits" REAL /* Total credits calculated for the user */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date of the calculation */,
  "peak_credits" REAL /* Total credits earned during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_credits" REAL /* Total credits earned during off-peak hours */,
  "renewable_credits" REAL /* Total credits earned from renewable sources */,
  "non_renewable_credits" REAL /* Total credits earned from non-renewable sources */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the calculation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_calculation_credit_id FOREIGN KEY ("credit_id") REFERENCES generation_credits ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_calculation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_records" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Billing period for the record */,
  "total_amount_due" REAL /* Total amount due for the billing period */,
  "credits_applied" REAL /* Total credits applied to the billing */,
  "peak_amount" REAL /* Amount due for peak consumption */,
  "off_peak_amount" REAL /* Amount due for off-peak consumption */,
  "renewable_amount" REAL /* Amount due for renewable consumption */,
  "non_renewable_amount" REAL /* Amount due for non-renewable consumption */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the billing record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related billing record */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing compliance */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance report */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance */,
  "compliance_period" TEXT /* Period for which the compliance is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the compliance record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_billing_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_id") REFERENCES billing_records ("billing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
